name: Dungeon Flowy
short_description: An auto-battle hack-and-slash RPG. Assemble a party of six and combine your favorite jobs to aim for the deepest part of the dungeon. Enhance your stats with passive equipment obtained from treasure chests or alter the probability of skill usage. Create your own unique build!
detailed_description:
An auto-battle hack-and-slash RPG. Assemble a party of six with your favorite jobs and aim for the deepest part of the dungeon.

Each dungeon floor offers three paths, and you can only choose one to proceed. Select the optimal route based on the items, treasure chests, and the number of monsters on each path.

Auto-Battle

In battle, each character automatically uses their skills.
Battles are divided into multiple waves, and at the start of each wave, you can use healing or buff items.

Equipment Upgrades

Every four floors, you can open treasure chests to update your characters' equipment (which provides passive effects). Enhance your stats or adjust the probability of skill usage to create your own unique build.

If your party is wiped out, their levels will be lost, but their equipment will remain intact.

Custom Portrait Feature

You can replace the images of party characters with any image you like.
